description_long: This apartment building complex is arranged in a U-shape, featuring three main wings connected at right angles. The structure is predominantly white with light blue-tinted balcony railings and glass, and brown accent panels at the ends and corners. Each wing consists of multiple floors, with regularly spaced windows and balconies along the facades, providing ample natural light and outdoor space for residents. The flat roofs and clean lines suggest a modern architectural style, while the open central courtyard area offers communal space. The entrances are centrally located on the main wing, and the building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern U-shaped apartment building with white facades, blue-tinted balconies, and brown accents, featuring multiple floors and a central courtyard.
description_view_0: The U-shaped layout is clearly visible, showing the open courtyard and the main entrance at the center of the longest wing.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the depth of the side wings and the regular arrangement of balconies and windows along the facades.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the symmetry of the building, with the main wing facing forward and the two side wings extending back.
description_view_3: The rear perspective shows the back facades of the side wings and the detailed balcony structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows across all facades, with regular spacing and alignment, often paired with balconies.
